---
title: "Moderated mediation under measurement and structural misspecification"
author: "Felipe Fontana Vieira and Yves Rosseel"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
---

## Introduction

Placeholder manuscript rendered by the CI pipeline (`.github/workflows/render.yaml`).
Replace this with the article body.

```{r}
#| include: false
# smoke-test for the knitr engine. add library() calls and data reads
# (e.g. readRDS("../results/summary.rds")) — plus the matching packages in
# gen_env.R's r_pkgs — as the manuscript needs them.
invisible(1 + 1)
```
